iterations.summary: Validated both reported issues as real and applied targeted fixes: /llms-full.txt now includes feature markdown body text, and the configured empty content collection directories now exist.

issues.title: Full LLM context drops feature detail content
issues.rationale: The previous implementation included each feature's detailed explanation in /llms-full.txt via feature.detail. After migrating features to markdown content, this route only outputs title, URL, and description, so the 'full LLM context' endpoint loses the substantive feature context that now lives in the markdown bodies.
issues.suggestedFix: Include the migrated markdown body or an explicit summary/detail frontmatter field in featuresList, for example by adding detail/summary to the feature schema and markdown files or by rendering/extracting plain text from each content entry for /llms-full.txt.
issues.reason: The current /llms-full.txt route only emitted each feature title, URL, and description, while the migrated feature markdown files contain the longer explanatory body content that replaced the previous feature.detail field.

issues.title: Content config references missing collection directories
issues.rationale: The new docs, faq, and glossary collections point at src/content/docs, src/content/faq, and src/content/glossary, but those directories do not exist. A focused npm run build succeeds, but Astro emits glob-loader warnings for all three missing base directories on every build, adding avoidable noise and potentially failing stricter warning-gated CI later.
issues.suggestedFix: Either add tracked placeholder files so the directories exist, or defer defining these collections until content is actually added.
issues.reason: src/content.config.ts defines docs, faq, and glossary collections with bases under src/content, but those directories were absent in the current repository state.
